'''shozaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yaller|yaller]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yaller|yaller]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shozaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozarithi|shozarithi]] || [[word:shozariji|shozariji]] || [[word:shozarishi|shozarishi]] || [[word:shozariki|shozariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozaruthuthu|shozaruthuthu]] || [[word:shozarujuju|shozarujuju]] || [[word:shozarushushu|shozarushushu]] || [[word:shozarukuku|shozarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozaruthu|shozaruthu]] || [[word:shozaruju|shozaruju]] || [[word:shozarushu|shozarushu]] || [[word:shozaruku|shozaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozarufthuf|shozarufthuf]] || [[word:shozarufjuf|shozarufjuf]] || [[word:shozarufshuf|shozarufshuf]] || [[word:shozarufkuf|shozarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozarethe|shozarethe]] || [[word:shozareje|shozareje]] || [[word:shozareshe|shozareshe]] || [[word:shozareke|shozareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozarothotho|shozarothotho]] || [[word:shozarojojo|shozarojojo]] || [[word:shozaroshosho|shozaroshosho]] || [[word:shozarokoko|shozarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozarotho|shozarotho]] || [[word:shozarojo|shozarojo]] || [[word:shozarosho|shozarosho]] || [[word:shozaroko|shozaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozarofthof|shozarofthof]] || [[word:shozarofjof|shozarofjof]] || [[word:shozarofshof|shozarofshof]] || [[word:shozarofkof|shozarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfthĂŻf|shozarĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfjĂŻf|shozarĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfshĂŻf|shozarĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfkĂŻf|shozarĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shozarĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shozarĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shozarĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shozarĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfthĂŻf|shozarĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfjĂŻf|shozarĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfshĂŻf|shozarĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfkĂŻf|shozarĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfthĂŻf|shozarĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfjĂŻf|shozarĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfshĂŻf|shozarĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozarĂŻfkĂŻf|shozarĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozarĂŠthĂŠ|shozarĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shozarĂŠjĂŠ|shozarĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shozarĂŠshĂŠ|shozarĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shozarĂŠkĂŠ|shozarĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozarathatha|shozarathatha]] || [[word:shozarajaja|shozarajaja]] || [[word:shozarashasha|shozarashasha]] || [[word:shozarakaka|shozarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozaratha|shozaratha]] || [[word:shozaraja|shozaraja]] || [[word:shozarasha|shozarasha]] || [[word:shozaraka|shozaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozarafthaf|shozarafthaf]] || [[word:shozarafjaf|shozarafjaf]] || [[word:shozarafshaf|shozarafshaf]] || [[word:shozarafkaf|shozarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shozarasha|shozarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozarshĂ«sha|shozarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozarosha|shozarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozarmusha|shozarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozaryasha|shozaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozarnkshĂ«sha|goshozarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozarnkrosha|goshozarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozarnkmusha|goshozarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozarnkyasha|goshozarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shozazarasha|shozazarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozazarshĂ«sha|shozazarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozazarosha|shozazarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozazarmusha|shozazarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozazaryasha|shozazaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozazarnkshĂ«sha|goshozazarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozazarnkrosha|goshozazarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozazarnkmusha|goshozazarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozazarnkyasha|goshozazarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shezĂŠrasha|shezĂŠrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shezĂŠrshĂ«sha|shezĂŠrshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shezĂŠrosha|shezĂŠrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shezĂŠrmusha|shezĂŠrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shezĂŠryasha|shezĂŠryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshezĂŠrnkshĂ«sha|goshezĂŠrnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshezĂŠrnkrosha|goshezĂŠrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshezĂŠrnkmusha|goshezĂŠrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshezĂŠrnkyasha|goshezĂŠrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shozfarasha|shozfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozfarshĂ«sha|shozfarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozfarosha|shozfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozfarmusha|shozfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozfaryasha|shozfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozfarnkshĂ«sha|goshozfarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozfarnkrosha|goshozfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozfarnkmusha|goshozfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozfarnkyasha|goshozfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
